description.firstVisit: Your quarters are exactly as you left them — which is to say, arranged with the particular chaos of someone who knows where everything is.
A narrow stone passage leads away from your quarters. Bare walls, bare floor. The way back is to the south.

east.traversalMsg: You push through the heavy door.

blocked_passage.name: Blocked Passage
blocked_passage.description: A short corridor. The way back is west.

west.traversalMsg: You push back through the heavy door.
